title: Earlier Host-Workflow And Workspace-Authority History Demotion Execution
objective: Hard-demote the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency host-workflow and workspace-authority decision/execution records so those records no longer read like live next-slice or operator guidance for the standalone repo boundary.
dependency_note: After Packet 183, the smallest remaining earlier 2026-05-06 non-gate branch is the host-workflow and workspace-authority decision/execution family: the host workflow planning and execution records, the workspace-authority decision and execution records, the root-entrypoint follow-on decision, and the lane dormancy decision. Those records preserve already-closed branch evidence, but their titles and top sections still read like live next-slice or operator guidance instead of historical provenance.
execution_scope: Retitle the six targeted Olares Dev Residency handoffs as historical host-workflow/workspace-authority records and add explicit current-routing blocks.
Retitle the six targeted Olares Dev Residency packet JSON titles as historical records and add explicit historical-note and current-routing fields.
Preserve the decision, execution, and observed-state evidence as provenance rather than rewriting the historical records wholesale.
forbidden_scope: broad 2026-05-06 archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing context
roadmap or PM-cockpit history normalization in the same packet
success_criteria: Each targeted host-workflow/workspace-authority handoff now leads as a historical record instead of live next-slice guidance.
Each targeted packet JSON now carries explicit historical-note and current-routing context instead of reading like a still-live decision or execution definition.
Repo-owned status routing records the family closure and leaves the roadmap/PM-cockpit family separate if still untouched.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-062-host-resident-developer-workflow-hardening-planning-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-063-host-bootstrap-status-operator-surface-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-065-post-064-workspace-authority-consolidation-decision-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-066-current-olares-workspace-authority-surface-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-068-post-067-root-entrypoint-routing-follow-on-decision-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-071-post-070-host-workflow-hardening-dormancy-decision-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Olares Dev Residency','^Current routing:'
next_action: Execute this packet as the earlier host-workflow/workspace-authority non-gate history slice, then reassess whether Packet 185 remains the next truthful adjacent lane.
